name: Dawnbreaker
description: Darkness fears the break of dawn!

10.left: Celestial Hammer Grants Allies Move Speed

15.right: x1.4 Celestial Hammer Contact Damage/Damage per Second

abilities.name: Break of Dawn
abilities.description: Whenever the sun comes out, Valora gains bonus base damage and vision that decreases throughout the course of the day. The higher Valora's level, the greater the applied health restore reduction value. Max Base Attack Damage Bonus: 10%. Max Vision Radius Bonus: 1.2. Max Heal Amp: (10%). Max Base Attack Damage Bonus Increase: 1%. Max Heal Amp Increase: (1%). Duration: 6.

abilities.name: Starbreaker
abilities.description: Dawnbreaker whirls her hammer multiple times, damaging enemies with her attack plus bonus damage. Grants magic resistance bonus and unobstructed movement during Starbreaker. Dawnbreaker is now slowed, but Starbreaker prevents her from being slowed lower than the set value. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Combo Duration: 1.1. Set Self Move Speed: 215 (0). Debuff Immunity Duration: (1.1). Cooldown: 17/15/13/11 (13/11/9/7). Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Celestial Hammer
abilities.description: Brightmaul leaves a trail of fire that damages and slows enemies along the way. Brightmaul's trail of fire now additionally grants bonus movement speed to allied unit. Hammer Search Radius: 200. Contact Damage Radius: 200. Contact Damage: 50/80/110/140 (70/112/154/196). Fire Trail Radius: 200. Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Luminosity
abilities.description: After a number of attacks, Dawnbreaker powers up, charging her next attack with a critical strike that heals allied heroes within the radius. Luminosity heal is less effective from attacking enemy and neutral creeps. Required Attacks: 4 (3). Lifesteal Radius: 650. Crit Damage: 125%/150%/175%/200% (150%/175%/200%/225%). Lifesteal: 35%/40%/45%/50%. Lifesteal to Ally Heal: 17.5%/20%/22.5%/25%. Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6.

abilities.name: Solar Guardian
abilities.description: Creates a pulsing effect at a location near an allied hero anywhere on the map and creates daylight for 6s. Each pulse damages enemy units and heals allies. Damage per Instance: 30/50/70. Heal per Instance: 45/70/95. Instance Interval: 0.5. Set Daytime Duration: 6. Cooldown: 110/100/90 (90/80/70). Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
